mission.title: vllm: Support Gemma 3 GGUF
mission.description: Add support for loading and serving Google Gemma 3 models in GGUF quantized format via vLLM. This enables running Gemma 3 models (e.g., gemma-3-27b-it) with reduced VRAM usage through GGUF quantization. Requested by 34+ users.

steps.title: Check current vLLM setup
steps.description:
Verify your vLLM version and configuration:
```bash
pip show vllm | grep Version
# or
python -c "import vllm; print(vllm.__version__)"
```
Gemma 3 GGUF support requires a recent version of vLLM with GGUF loading support.

steps.title: Obtain a Gemma 3 GGUF model
steps.description:
Download a GGUF-quantized Gemma 3 model from HuggingFace:
- [bartowski/google_gemma-3-27b-it-GGUF](https://huggingface.co/bartowski/google_gemma-3-27b-it-GGUF)

Choose a quantization level based on your available VRAM (e.g., Q4_K_M for a good balance of quality and memory usage).

steps.title: Serve Gemma 3 GGUF with vLLM
steps.description:
Start the vLLM server with the Gemma 3 GGUF model:
```bash
python -m vllm.entrypoints.openai.api_server \
  --model <path-to-gemma3-gguf> \
  --tokenizer google/gemma-3-27b-it
```
The GGUF weights are dequantized at load time for inference.

steps.title: Verify Gemma 3 GGUF inference works
steps.description:
Test that Gemma 3 GGUF model serving is working:
```bash
curl http://localhost:8000/v1/chat/completions \
  -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
  -d '{"model": "gemma-3-27b-it", "messages": [{"role": "user", "content": "Explain quantum computing briefly."}], "max_tokens": 100}'
```
You should receive a valid chat completion response from the GGUF-quantized Gemma 3 model.

resolution.summary: vLLM added support for Gemma 3 models in GGUF format by extending the GGUF weight loading infrastructure to handle the Gemma 3 architecture. This enables users to run quantized Gemma 3 models with reduced VRAM requirements while leveraging vLLM's high-throughput serving capabilities.
codeSnippets:
# Serve Gemma 3 GGUF model
python -m vllm.entrypoints.openai.api_server \
  --model <path-to-gemma3-gguf> \
  --tokenizer google/gemma-3-27b-it

prerequisites.description: Python 3.8+, pip, a CUDA-capable GPU with sufficient VRAM, and a working vLLM installation (pip install vllm).
